name: SyncTool-WebServerToAndroid
description: One-way sync from KenpoFlashcardsWebServer into kenpoflashcardsproject-v2. Default output is repo-root\kenpoflashcardsproject-v2_synced and logs go to repo-root\logs\Sync\WebServerToAndroid. Designed to run from sidscri-apps\tools\SyncTool-WebServerToAndroid.
